creator: theraven@FreeBSD.org
text:
pkg-message contains the following text:

NOTE: The musicpd server is pretty useless without a client.
      You might want to install one of the following ports too:
      musicpc, ncmpc, glurp, gmpc, kmp, or phpmp.


Most of these exist, but kmp does not.  quimup and qmpdlient do, so these should probably be recommended.  Ideally, this text would also sort them according to the kind of UI, for example:

Command line: musicpc, ncmpc (Curses)
GNOME / GTK: glurp, gmpc
KDE / Qt: quimup, qmpdlient
Web: phpmp
